top_signals.title: China’s Trade Imbalance With EU Swells as Imports Slip Again
top_signals.summary: China’s imports from the European Union dropped for the first time in three months, again swelling a trade imbalance that’s put it on a collision course with the bloc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan’s SBI Shinsei Bank plans crypto rewards program for depositors this fall: Nikkei
top_signals.summary: The program is set to grant customers vouchers worth 20% of their deposit interest payments, redeemable for cryptocurrencies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Airlines find the grass isn't always greener with new engines
top_signals.summary: Airline CEOs complained that manufacturers aren't making enough of their engines and that they're falling short on reliability.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
